name: strict-mapping-guard
description: Run strict mapping validation on save and surface issues in Problems.

strictMappingGuard.enableOnSave.description: Run strict mapping validation when a relevant file is saved.

strictMappingGuard.autoDetectRepository.description: Auto-detect whether current workspace should run strict mapping validation.

strictMappingGuard.notifyOnAutoFail.description: Show notification when auto validation detects mapping issues.

strictMappingGuard.watchAllFiles.description: When true, any workspace file change can trigger change validation (except ignored prefixes).

strictMappingGuard.watchGlobs.description: Workspace-relative glob patterns watched for external file changes.

strictMappingGuard.ignorePathPrefixes.description: Path prefixes excluded from auto-triggered validation.

strictMappingGuard.requiredRegistryPaths.description: Any existing path in this list counts as a mapping registry for repository detection.

strictMappingGuard.requiredValidatorPath.description: Any existing path in this list counts as a validator script for repository detection.

strictMappingGuard.fullValidationCommand.description: Command used for manual full validation.
